---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the need.

**Proposed solution**
Describe the tool or change you'd like.

**Should it run in-browser or on the server?**
e.g. in-browser (privacy), or server (needs LibreOffice/OCR/etc).

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.
